content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


March 23, 2004

The Honorable Wilma Chan
California Legislature
Post Office Box 942849
Sacramento, CA 94249-0016

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-271

Dear Assemblymember Chan:

Pursuant to my letter of March 12, 2004, a copy of which is enclosed, this matter is deemed withdrawn and our file will be closed.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division

CST:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\03-271

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 12, 2004

The Honorable Wilma Chan
California State Assembly
State Capitol
Sacramento, California 94249-2116

Re: Your Request for Advice; Our File No. 03-271

Dear Assemblymember Chan:

I am in receipt of your letter regarding the rules governing legal defense funds. I left a message for you on February 23, 2004, requesting further information and clarification in order to process your request. I would be happy to speak with you at the number above or with your aide if you prefer to provide the assistance you requested. If I do not receive word by Friday, the 19th of this month, that the letter I mailed is of interest to you, I shall assume the request for advice is withdrawn.

Very truly yours,

C. Scott Toecher
Commission Counsel

Scott Tocher Counsel, Legal Division The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Assemblymember Wilma Chan regarding her request for advice on rules governing legal defense funds. The Commission states that they left a message for her on February 23, 2004, and are seeking further information and clarification. They offer to speak with her or her aide if she prefers. If no response is received by Friday, March 19th, the Commission will assume the request for advice is withdrawn.
